name: Vermicelli with No-Cook Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Olive oil from the tomatoes
8 oz Vermicelli or thin spaghetti, cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. In a serving bowl, whisk together the eggs, sun-dried tomatoes (oil), Parmesan cheese, parsley, garlic, and lemon juice.
2. While the pasta is still hot, add it to the egg mixture.
3. Toss well to coat the pasta with the sauce.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Serve hot.
